Article_Code_Markdown

Fletcher Noble

2026-07-08

R Markdown

#Anemonefish prioritise mutualistic partner over social group during marine heatwave – Code for data analysis ##Date Prep

##Data Prep ####
data<-read.csv("Article_Database.csv", header =  TRUE)
#load required packages
library(rmarkdown)
## Warning: package 'rmarkdown' was built under R version 4.4.3
library(dplyr)
## Warning: package 'dplyr' was built under R version 4.4.1
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(glmmTMB)
## Warning: package 'glmmTMB' was built under R version 4.4.2
## Warning in check_dep_version(dep_pkg = "TMB"): package version mismatch: 
## glmmTMB was built with TMB package version 1.9.15
## Current TMB package version is 1.9.14
## Please re-install glmmTMB from source or restore original 'TMB' package (see '?reinstalling' for more information)
library(ggplot2)
## Warning: package 'ggplot2' was built under R version 4.4.3
library(DHARMa)
## Warning: package 'DHARMa' was built under R version 4.4.3
## This is DHARMa 0.4.7. For overview type '?DHARMa'. For recent changes, type news(package = 'DHARMa')
library(sjPlot)
## Warning: package 'sjPlot' was built under R version 4.4.3
## 
## Attaching package: 'sjPlot'
## The following object is masked from 'package:ggplot2':
## 
##     set_theme
library(emmeans)
## Warning: package 'emmeans' was built under R version 4.4.3
## Welcome to emmeans.
## Caution: You lose important information if you filter this package's results.
## See '? untidy'
library(performance)
library(ggeffects)
## Warning: package 'ggeffects' was built under R version 4.4.1
library(lme4)
## Warning: package 'lme4' was built under R version 4.4.2
## Loading required package: Matrix
library(ggsignif)
## Warning: package 'ggsignif' was built under R version 4.4.3
library(scales)
## Warning: package 'scales' was built under R version 4.4.3
library(ggeffects)
library(tidyr)
## Warning: package 'tidyr' was built under R version 4.4.1
## 
## Attaching package: 'tidyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:Matrix':
## 
##     expand, pack, unpack
library(gghalves)
library(patchwork)
## Warning: package 'patchwork' was built under R version 4.4.3
library(lubridate)
## Warning: package 'lubridate' was built under R version 4.4.1
## 
## Attaching package: 'lubridate'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     date, intersect, setdiff, union
library(ggdist)
## Warning: package 'ggdist' was built under R version 4.4.3
library(grid)

#Ensure that all factors are in correct format 
data$Date <- as.Date(data$Date, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
data$Bleached_Overall<-as.factor(data$Bleached_Overall)
data$Behaviour<-as.factor(data$Behaviour)
data$Subject<-as.factor(data$Subject)

#Create column for Proportion of time visible
data <- data %>%
  mutate(Time_vis_proportion = Time_vis / Total_duration_.s.)
data$Anemone<-as.factor(data$Anemone)

#Filter out anemones where video data is incomplete from main database
data <- data %>% 
  filter(!Anemone %in% c("B62", "B46","B64", "B83", "LY353","LY399","SY517","B142","B28","B49", "B68"))
#remove empty subjects
data <- data %>%
  droplevels(data$Subject)
data %>%
  distinct(Anemone, Bleached_Overall) %>%  # get unique anemone-bleaching status count
  count(Bleached_Overall)
##   Bleached_Overall  n
## 1            FALSE  6
## 2             TRUE 17
#merges all aggressive categories into one
data <- data %>%
  mutate(Behavioural_Category = case_when(
    Behavioural_Category %in% c("Aggressive - Display", "Aggressive - Overt", "Aggressive Display") ~ "Aggressive",
    TRUE ~ Behavioural_Category
  ))
#do same for neutral
data <- data %>%
  mutate(Behavioural_Category = case_when(
    Behavioural_Category %in% c("Aggressive - Display", "Aggressive - Overt", "Aggressive Display") ~ "Aggressive",
    Behavioural_Category %in% c("Neutral", "Neutral - Bidirectional", "Neutral - Unidirectional") ~ "Neutral",
    TRUE ~ Behavioural_Category
  ))
#scale continuous variables for use in models
data$Day_Temp_SC <- scale(data$Day_Temp, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
data$N_fish_SC <- scale(data$N_fish, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
data$Anemone_Area_SC <- scale(data$Anemone_Area, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
data$ThermalExposure_SC <-scale(data$ThermalExposure, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
#Create separate dataframes for each individual behavioural category to allow for easier analysis
datamain<- data %>%
  filter(Behavioural_Category %in% c("Maintenance"))
dataagg<- data %>%
  filter(Behavioural_Category %in% c("Aggressive"))
datadef<- data %>%
  filter(Behavioural_Category %in% c("Defence"))
dataneu<- data %>%
  filter(Behavioural_Category %in% c("Neutral"))
datasub<- data%>%
  filter(Behavioural_Category %in% c("Submissive"))
dataall <- data

##Activity Model

##Activity plots ####
#Create model to analyse activity levels 
datavis<-lmer(Time_vis_proportion~Heatwave_Status*Bleached_Overall+ThermalExposure_SC+Behaviours_per_second+
                 Subject+N_fish+Anemone_Area_SC+
                 (1|Anemone),
               data=data)
#Model Outputs 
anova(datavis)
## Analysis of Variance Table
##                                  npar Sum Sq Mean Sq   F value
## Heatwave_Status                     1  0.015   0.015    0.3701
## Bleached_Overall                    1  0.045   0.045    1.0913
## ThermalExposure_SC                  1  1.391   1.391   34.0324
## Behaviours_per_second               1  0.502   0.502   12.2754
## Subject                             2 88.162  44.081 1078.2403
## N_fish                              1  1.944   1.944   47.5473
## Anemone_Area_SC                     1  0.083   0.083    2.0234
## Heatwave_Status:Bleached_Overall    1  0.402   0.402    9.8449
summary(datavis)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML ['lmerMod']
## Formula: 
## Time_vis_proportion ~ Heatwave_Status * Bleached_Overall + ThermalExposure_SC +  
##     Behaviours_per_second + Subject + N_fish + Anemone_Area_SC +  
##     (1 | Anemone)
##    Data: data
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: -1052.4
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -2.21973 -0.62262 -0.04022  0.72193  2.43497 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Anemone  (Intercept) 0.01429  0.1195  
##  Residual             0.04088  0.2022  
## Number of obs: 3315, groups:  Anemone, 23
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                             Estimate Std. Error t value
## (Intercept)                                 0.205908   0.080831   2.547
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                       0.179916   0.033730   5.334
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                       -0.041912   0.058842  -0.712
## ThermalExposure_SC                         -0.073238   0.014686  -4.987
## Behaviours_per_second                      -0.298994   0.352989  -0.847
## SubjectRank 2                              -0.048709   0.008600  -5.664
## SubjectRank 3                              -0.369333   0.008631 -42.789
## N_fish                                      0.156651   0.022992   6.813
## Anemone_Area_SC                             0.036292   0.025700   1.412
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE -0.052088   0.016601  -3.138
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) Htw_SD B_OTRU ThE_SC Bhvr__ SbjcR2 SbjcR3 N_fish A_A_SC
## Htwv_SttsDr -0.051                                                        
## Blchd_OTRUE -0.546  0.067                                                 
## ThrmlExp_SC  0.018 -0.913 -0.022                                          
## Bhvrs_pr_sc -0.012  0.010  0.005 -0.016                                   
## SubjectRnk2 -0.053  0.000  0.000  0.000  0.000                            
## SubjectRnk3 -0.054  0.001  0.000 -0.001  0.080  0.498                     
## N_fish      -0.759 -0.189  0.005  0.207 -0.014  0.000 -0.001              
## Anemn_Ar_SC  0.023 -0.011 -0.177  0.012  0.002  0.000  0.000  0.094       
## H_SD:B_OTRU  0.075 -0.583 -0.137  0.269  0.002 -0.001  0.000  0.056  0.003
r2(datavis)
## # R2 for Mixed Models
## 
##   Conditional R2: 0.535
##      Marginal R2: 0.372
tab_model(datavis) #Easier to read in tab, used throughout code
  Time_vis_proportion
Predictors Estimates CI p
(Intercept) 0.21 0.05 – 0.36 0.011
Heatwave Status [During] 0.18 0.11 – 0.25 <0.001
Bleached Overall [TRUE] -0.04 -0.16 – 0.07 0.476
ThermalExposure SC -0.07 -0.10 – -0.04 <0.001
Behaviours per second -0.30 -0.99 – 0.39 0.397
Subject [Rank 2] -0.05 -0.07 – -0.03 <0.001
Subject [Rank 3] -0.37 -0.39 – -0.35 <0.001
N fish 0.16 0.11 – 0.20 <0.001
Anemone Area SC 0.04 -0.01 – 0.09 0.158
Heatwave Status [During]
× Bleached Overall [TRUE] 		-0.05 -0.08 – -0.02 0.002
Random Effects
σ2 0.04
τ00 Anemone 0.01
ICC 0.26
N Anemone 23
Observations 3315
Marginal R2 / Conditional R2 0.372 / 0.535 
check_model(datavis) #check model performance
## Some of the variables were in matrix-format - probably you used
##   `scale()` on your data?
##   If so, and you get an error, please try `datawizard::standardize()` to
##   standardize your data.
## Some of the variables were in matrix-format - probably you used
##   `scale()` on your data?
##   If so, and you get an error, please try `datawizard::standardize()` to
##   standardize your data.

#Posthoc Testing to allow analysis of interactiions 
emmeans_interactionvis <- emmeans(datavis,pairwise ~ Heatwave_Status | Bleached_Overall)
## Note: D.f. calculations have been disabled because the number of observations exceeds 3000.
## To enable adjustments, add the argument 'pbkrtest.limit = 3315' (or larger)
## [or, globally, 'set emm_options(pbkrtest.limit = 3315)' or larger];
## but be warned that this may result in large computation time and memory use.
## Note: D.f. calculations have been disabled because the number of observations exceeds 3000.
## To enable adjustments, add the argument 'lmerTest.limit = 3315' (or larger)
## [or, globally, 'set emm_options(lmerTest.limit = 3315)' or larger];
## but be warned that this may result in large computation time and memory use.
emmeans_interactionvis
## $emmeans
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean     SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.457 0.0525 Inf     0.354     0.560
##  During           0.637 0.0537 Inf     0.532     0.742
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean     SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.415 0.0327 Inf     0.351     0.479
##  During           0.543 0.0335 Inf     0.477     0.609
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Subject, N_fish 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: asymptotic 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE:
##  contrast        estimate     SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.180 0.0337 Inf  -5.334  <.0001
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE:
##  contrast        estimate     SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.128 0.0276 Inf  -4.636  <.0001
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Subject, N_fish 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: asymptotic
emmeans_interactionvis1 <- emmeans(datavis,pairwise ~ Bleached_Overall | Heatwave_Status)
## Note: D.f. calculations have been disabled because the number of observations exceeds 3000.
## To enable adjustments, add the argument 'pbkrtest.limit = 3315' (or larger)
## [or, globally, 'set emm_options(pbkrtest.limit = 3315)' or larger];
## but be warned that this may result in large computation time and memory use.
## Note: D.f. calculations have been disabled because the number of observations exceeds 3000.
## To enable adjustments, add the argument 'lmerTest.limit = 3315' (or larger)
## [or, globally, 'set emm_options(lmerTest.limit = 3315)' or larger];
## but be warned that this may result in large computation time and memory use.
emmeans_interactionvis1
## $emmeans
## Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean     SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.457 0.0525 Inf     0.354     0.560
##  TRUE              0.415 0.0327 Inf     0.351     0.479
## 
## Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean     SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.637 0.0537 Inf     0.532     0.742
##  TRUE              0.543 0.0335 Inf     0.477     0.609
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Subject, N_fish 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: asymptotic 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
## Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate     SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   0.0419 0.0588 Inf   0.712  0.4763
## 
## Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate     SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   0.0940 0.0589 Inf   1.596  0.1106
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Subject, N_fish 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: asymptotic
emmip(datavis, Bleached_Overall ~ Heatwave_Status) #shows effect size 
## Note: D.f. calculations have been disabled because the number of observations exceeds 3000.
## To enable adjustments, add the argument 'pbkrtest.limit = 3315' (or larger)
## [or, globally, 'set emm_options(pbkrtest.limit = 3315)' or larger];
## but be warned that this may result in large computation time and memory use.
## Note: D.f. calculations have been disabled because the number of observations exceeds 3000.
## To enable adjustments, add the argument 'lmerTest.limit = 3315' (or larger)
## [or, globally, 'set emm_options(lmerTest.limit = 3315)' or larger];
## but be warned that this may result in large computation time and memory use.
## Warning: `aes_()` was deprecated in ggplot2 3.0.0.
## ℹ Please use tidy evaluation idioms with `aes()`
## ℹ The deprecated feature was likely used in the emmeans package.
##   Please report the issue at <https://github.com/rvlenth/emmeans/issues>.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.

tapply(data$Time_vis_proportion, data$Heatwave_Status, quantile)
## $Before
##        0%       25%       50%       75%      100% 
## 0.0000000 0.4028316 0.5798037 0.7100709 0.9790290 
## 
## $During
##        0%       25%       50%       75%      100% 
## 0.0000000 0.3360087 0.5370451 0.7969938 1.2911679
tapply(data$Time_vis_proportion, data$Bleached_Overall, quantile)
## $`FALSE`
##        0%       25%       50%       75%      100% 
## 0.0000000 0.4609465 0.6004439 0.8209229 0.9790290 
## 
## $`TRUE`
##        0%       25%       50%       75%      100% 
## 0.0000000 0.3438318 0.5370451 0.7366980 1.2911679
quantile(data$Time_vis_proportion)
##        0%       25%       50%       75%      100% 
## 0.0000000 0.3459483 0.5650252 0.7499261 1.2911679
emm_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_interactionvis)
## Warning in as.data.frame.emm_list(emmeans_interactionvis): Note: 'as.data.frame' has combined your 2 sets of results into one object,
## and this affects things like adjusted P values. Refer to the annotations.
###Raincloud plots ####
data$predicted <- predict(datavis) #extract predicted values from the model

ggplot(data, aes(x = Heatwave_Status, y = predicted, fill = Bleached_Overall)) +
  
  geom_half_violin(
    side = "l",
    alpha = 0.6,
    trim = FALSE,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)
  ) +
  
  geom_jitter(
    aes(color = Bleached_Overall),
    position = position_jitterdodge(
      jitter.width = 0.1,
      dodge.width = 0.8
    ),
    alpha = 0.4,
    size = 1.5
  ) +
  
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.15,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Time Point",
    y = "Predicted Proportion of Time Visible",
    fill = "Bleaching Status",   # legend title for fill
    color = "Bleaching Status"   # legend title for points
  ) +
  
  # Okabe–Ito colours
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = "#009E73", "TRUE" = "#D55E00"),
    labels = c("FALSE" = "Unbleached", "TRUE" = "Bleached")
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = "#009E73", "TRUE" = "#D55E00"),
    labels = c("FALSE" = "Unbleached", "TRUE" = "Bleached")
  ) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = c(
      "Before" = "Time Point 1",
      "During" = "Time Point 2"
    )
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    # Add axis lines
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    # Make axis text larger
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    # Make axis titles larger
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16)
  )

##Behaviour Proportion Models

##Proportionality Data ####
###Model ####
dataall <- dataall %>%
  group_by(Subject, Heatwave_Status, Bleached_Overall, Anemone) %>% 
  mutate(Total_Count_All = sum(Count)) %>%
  ungroup()

colnames(dataall)
##  [1] "Observation_id"        "Subject"               "Behaviour"            
##  [4] "Total_duration_.s."    "Time_vis"              "Anemone"              
##  [7] "Reef"                  "Bleached_Status"       "Heatwave_Status"      
## [10] "Date"                  "Breeding.Non.Breeding" "Behavioural_Category" 
## [13] "Behaviours_per_second" "Count"                 "N_fish"               
## [16] "Bleached_Overall"      "Anemone_Area"          "Average_pH"           
## [19] "Average_Salinity"      "Average_Conductivity"  "Average_Lux"          
## [22] "Day_Temp"              "Lunar_Range_T"         "Lunar_Mean_T"         
## [25] "Lunar_Max_T"           "ThermalExposure"       "Time_vis_proportion"  
## [28] "Day_Temp_SC"           "N_fish_SC"             "Anemone_Area_SC"      
## [31] "ThermalExposure_SC"    "Total_Count_All"
model <- glmmTMB(
  Count ~ Heatwave_Status * Bleached_Overall * Behavioural_Category 
  + N_fish + Anemone_Area_SC+Subject + ThermalExposure_SC + 
   # (1|Anemone)+
   offset(log(Total_Count_All)) ,  
  data = dataall,
  family = poisson
)
#Model Outputs
summary(model)
##  Family: poisson  ( log )
## Formula:          
## Count ~ Heatwave_Status * Bleached_Overall * Behavioural_Category +  
##     N_fish + Anemone_Area_SC + Subject + ThermalExposure_SC +  
##     offset(log(Total_Count_All))
## Data: dataall
## 
##      AIC      BIC   logLik deviance df.resid 
##  15035.2  15187.9  -7492.6  14985.2     3290 
## 
## 
## Conditional model:
##                                                                              Estimate
## (Intercept)                                                                -5.708e+00
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                                      -2.140e+00
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                                        7.251e-01
## Behavioural_CategoryDefence                                                 3.105e+00
## Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance                                             3.404e+00
## Behavioural_CategoryNeutral                                                 2.474e+00
## Behavioural_CategorySubmissive                                              3.090e-01
## N_fish                                                                     -2.562e-03
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                             4.723e-05
## SubjectRank 2                                                              -1.222e-03
## SubjectRank 3                                                               1.327e-03
## ThermalExposure_SC                                                         -1.824e-03
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                                  2.778e+00
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategoryDefence                           2.268e+00
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance                       2.206e+00
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategoryNeutral                           1.833e+00
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategorySubmissive                        1.563e+00
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryDefence                           -7.256e-01
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance                       -5.609e-01
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryNeutral                           -1.198e+00
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategorySubmissive                        -1.695e+00
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryDefence     -2.756e+00
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance -2.936e+00
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryNeutral     -2.971e+00
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategorySubmissive  -2.333e+00
##                                                                            Std. Error
## (Intercept)                                                                 2.708e-01
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                                       7.552e-01
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                                        2.815e-01
## Behavioural_CategoryDefence                                                 2.555e-01
## Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance                                             2.551e-01
## Behavioural_CategoryNeutral                                                 2.603e-01
## Behavioural_CategorySubmissive                                              3.286e-01
## N_fish                                                                      3.669e-02
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                             1.527e-02
## SubjectRank 2                                                               2.892e-02
## SubjectRank 3                                                               4.080e-02
## ThermalExposure_SC                                                          4.244e-02
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                                  7.665e-01
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategoryDefence                           7.534e-01
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance                       7.533e-01
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategoryNeutral                           7.579e-01
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategorySubmissive                        8.276e-01
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryDefence                            2.890e-01
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance                        2.881e-01
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryNeutral                            2.985e-01
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategorySubmissive                         4.374e-01
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryDefence      7.716e-01
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance  7.712e-01
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryNeutral      7.818e-01
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategorySubmissive   9.208e-01
##                                                                            z value
## (Intercept)                                                                -21.080
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                                       -2.833
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                                         2.576
## Behavioural_CategoryDefence                                                 12.151
## Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance                                             13.341
## Behavioural_CategoryNeutral                                                  9.506
## Behavioural_CategorySubmissive                                               0.941
## N_fish                                                                      -0.070
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                              0.003
## SubjectRank 2                                                               -0.042
## SubjectRank 3                                                                0.033
## ThermalExposure_SC                                                          -0.043
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                                   3.625
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategoryDefence                            3.010
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance                        2.929
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategoryNeutral                            2.419
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategorySubmissive                         1.888
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryDefence                            -2.511
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance                        -1.947
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryNeutral                            -4.014
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategorySubmissive                         -3.876
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryDefence      -3.572
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance  -3.807
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryNeutral      -3.800
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategorySubmissive   -2.534
##                                                                            Pr(>|z|)
## (Intercept)                                                                 < 2e-16
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                                      0.004608
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                                       0.009999
## Behavioural_CategoryDefence                                                 < 2e-16
## Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance                                             < 2e-16
## Behavioural_CategoryNeutral                                                 < 2e-16
## Behavioural_CategorySubmissive                                             0.346937
## N_fish                                                                     0.944324
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                            0.997532
## SubjectRank 2                                                              0.966297
## SubjectRank 3                                                              0.974058
## ThermalExposure_SC                                                         0.965716
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                                 0.000289
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategoryDefence                          0.002612
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance                      0.003403
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategoryNeutral                          0.015570
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategorySubmissive                       0.058975
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryDefence                           0.012040
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance                       0.051532
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryNeutral                           5.96e-05
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategorySubmissive                        0.000106
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryDefence     0.000354
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance 0.000141
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryNeutral     0.000145
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategorySubmissive  0.011285
##                                                                               
## (Intercept)                                                                ***
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                                      ** 
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                                       ** 
## Behavioural_CategoryDefence                                                ***
## Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance                                            ***
## Behavioural_CategoryNeutral                                                ***
## Behavioural_CategorySubmissive                                                
## N_fish                                                                        
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                               
## SubjectRank 2                                                                 
## SubjectRank 3                                                                 
## ThermalExposure_SC                                                            
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                                 ***
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategoryDefence                          ** 
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance                      ** 
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategoryNeutral                          *  
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Behavioural_CategorySubmissive                       .  
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryDefence                           *  
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance                       .  
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryNeutral                           ***
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategorySubmissive                        ***
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryDefence     ***
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryMaintenance ***
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategoryNeutral     ***
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:Behavioural_CategorySubmissive  *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
r2(model)
## # R2 for Generalized Linear Regression
##   Nagelkerke's R2: 0.839
performance::check_singularity(model)
## [1] FALSE
# Calculate estimated marginal means for the 3-way interaction
emm_model <- emmeans(
  model,
  ~ Heatwave_Status * Bleached_Overall * Behavioural_Category,
  type = "response"   # because Poisson link; gives predicted counts
)

# Create an interaction plot using emmip
emmip(
  model,
  Bleached_Overall ~ Heatwave_Status | Behavioural_Category,
  type = "response",
  CIs = TRUE,
  at = list(N_fish = mean(dataall$N_fish),
            Anemone_Area_SC = mean(dataall$Anemone_Area_SC),
            ThermalExposure_SC = mean(dataall$ThermalExposure_SC))
)

#thermal exposure crashes model, works when scaled
emm <- emmeans(model, ~ Bleached_Overall | Heatwave_Status * Behavioural_Category, type = "response")
pairs(emm)  
## Heatwave_Status = Before, Behavioural_Category = Aggressive:
##  contrast      ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE / TRUE 0.4843 0.1360 Inf    1  -2.576  0.0100
## 
## Heatwave_Status = During, Behavioural_Category = Aggressive:
##  contrast      ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE / TRUE 0.0301 0.0215 Inf    1  -4.914  <.0001
## 
## Heatwave_Status = Before, Behavioural_Category = Defence:
##  contrast      ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE / TRUE 1.0005 0.0665 Inf    1   0.008  0.9939
## 
## Heatwave_Status = During, Behavioural_Category = Defence:
##  contrast      ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE / TRUE 0.9784 0.0594 Inf    1  -0.360  0.7192
## 
## Heatwave_Status = Before, Behavioural_Category = Maintenance:
##  contrast      ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE / TRUE 0.8485 0.0529 Inf    1  -2.634  0.0084
## 
## Heatwave_Status = During, Behavioural_Category = Maintenance:
##  contrast      ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE / TRUE 0.9935 0.0600 Inf    1  -0.108  0.9143
## 
## Heatwave_Status = Before, Behavioural_Category = Neutral:
##  contrast      ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE / TRUE 1.6049 0.1600 Inf    1   4.732  <.0001
## 
## Heatwave_Status = During, Behavioural_Category = Neutral:
##  contrast      ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE / TRUE 1.9455 0.2300 Inf    1   5.639  <.0001
## 
## Heatwave_Status = Before, Behavioural_Category = Submissive:
##  contrast      ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE / TRUE 2.6386 0.8840 Inf    1   2.897  0.0038
## 
## Heatwave_Status = During, Behavioural_Category = Submissive:
##  contrast      ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE / TRUE 1.6905 0.6510 Inf    1   1.363  0.1730
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish, Subject 
## Tests are performed on the log scale
check_model(model)
## `check_outliers()` does not yet support models of class `glmmTMB`.

emm1 <- emmeans(model, ~ Heatwave_Status | Bleached_Overall * Behavioural_Category, type = "response")
pairs(emm1) 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behavioural_Category = Aggressive:
##  contrast        ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  Before / During 8.496 6.4200 Inf    1   2.833  0.0046
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behavioural_Category = Aggressive:
##  contrast        ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  Before / During 0.528 0.0928 Inf    1  -3.632  0.0003
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behavioural_Category = Defence:
##  contrast        ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  Before / During 0.880 0.1000 Inf    1  -1.127  0.2595
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behavioural_Category = Defence:
##  contrast        ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  Before / During 0.860 0.0806 Inf    1  -1.607  0.1082
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behavioural_Category = Maintenance:
##  contrast        ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  Before / During 0.936 0.1050 Inf    1  -0.590  0.5550
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behavioural_Category = Maintenance:
##  contrast        ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  Before / During 1.096 0.1010 Inf    1   0.993  0.3207
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behavioural_Category = Neutral:
##  contrast        ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  Before / During 1.359 0.1910 Inf    1   2.184  0.0290
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behavioural_Category = Neutral:
##  contrast        ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  Before / During 1.647 0.2200 Inf    1   3.736  0.0002
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behavioural_Category = Submissive:
##  contrast        ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  Before / During 1.780 0.6420 Inf    1   1.599  0.1099
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behavioural_Category = Submissive:
##  contrast        ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  Before / During 1.141 0.4330 Inf    1   0.347  0.7287
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish, Subject 
## Tests are performed on the log scale
emm_df <- as.data.frame(pairs(emm1))

emm_df <- emm_df %>%
  mutate(
    percent_change = (1 / ratio - 1) * 100
  )

emm_df <- emm_df %>%
  mutate(
    direction = case_when(
      percent_change > 0 ~ "Increase",
      percent_change < 0 ~ "Decrease",
      TRUE ~ "No change"
    )
  )

emm_df_clean <- emm_df %>%
  select(Bleached_Overall, Behavioural_Category, contrast,
         ratio, percent_change, direction, p.value)
emm_df_clean
##    Bleached_Overall Behavioural_Category        contrast     ratio
## 1             FALSE           Aggressive Before / During 8.4964137
## 2              TRUE           Aggressive Before / During 0.5279782
## 3             FALSE              Defence Before / During 0.8796959
## 4              TRUE              Defence Before / During 0.8602783
## 5             FALSE          Maintenance Before / During 0.9356654
## 6              TRUE          Maintenance Before / During 1.0955665
## 7             FALSE              Neutral Before / During 1.3585750
## 8              TRUE              Neutral Before / During 1.6468770
## 9             FALSE           Submissive Before / During 1.7804321
## 10             TRUE           Submissive Before / During 1.1407203
##    percent_change direction      p.value
## 1      -88.230328  Decrease 0.0046078057
## 2       89.401751  Increase 0.0002807152
## 3       13.675653  Increase 0.2595406562
## 4       16.241460  Increase 0.1081503291
## 5        6.875814  Increase 0.5549748345
## 6       -8.723024  Decrease 0.3206697440
## 7      -26.393463  Decrease 0.0289902154
## 8      -39.279010  Decrease 0.0001869465
## 9      -43.833860  Decrease 0.1098761670
## 10     -12.336092  Decrease 0.7286989154
emm_bleach_behav <- emmeans(
  model,
  ~ Bleached_Overall | Behavioural_Category,
  type = "response"
)
## NOTE: Results may be misleading due to involvement in interactions
pairs(emm_bleach_behav)
## Behavioural_Category = Aggressive:
##  contrast     ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE / TRUE 0.121 0.0463 Inf    1  -5.516  <.0001
## 
## Behavioural_Category = Defence:
##  contrast     ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE / TRUE 0.989 0.0447 Inf    1  -0.236  0.8135
## 
## Behavioural_Category = Maintenance:
##  contrast     ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE / TRUE 0.918 0.0400 Inf    1  -1.961  0.0499
## 
## Behavioural_Category = Neutral:
##  contrast     ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE / TRUE 1.767 0.1370 Inf    1   7.353  <.0001
## 
## Behavioural_Category = Submissive:
##  contrast     ratio     SE  df null z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE / TRUE 2.112 0.5390 Inf    1   2.928  0.0034
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Heatwave_Status, N_fish, Subject 
## Tests are performed on the log scale
tab_model(model)

Observations 3315
R2 Nagelkerke 0.839 
###Plots ####
#Nowdo summariseandproportions onfiltereddata
behaviour_prop <-data%>%
  group_by(Heatwave_Status,Bleached_Overall,Behavioural_Category) %>%
  summarise(Total_Count= sum(Count), .groups= "drop") %>%
  group_by(Heatwave_Status,Bleached_Overall) %>%
  
  mutate(Proportion= Total_Count / sum(Total_Count)) %>%
  mutate(Group= paste0(Heatwave_Status, "|", ifelse(as.logical(Bleached_Overall), "Bleached","Unbleached")))

#Calculatelabelpositionsandformattedlabels
behaviour_prop <-behaviour_prop %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  arrange(Group,Behavioural_Category) %>%
  mutate(
    label_pos= cumsum(Proportion)-(Proportion / 2),
    Label= scales::percent(Proportion, accuracy= 1)
  )
#Plotusingfilteredsummary
#Shows different proportions of behaviours, not used in paper
ggplot(behaviour_prop, aes(x = Group, y = Proportion, fill = Behavioural_Category)) +
  
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0,1)
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "#009E73",
      "#D55E00",
      "#0072B2",
      "#56B4E9",
      "#E69F00"
    )
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Time Point | Bleaching Status",
    y = "Proportion of Behaviour Observed",
    fill = "Behaviour"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),  # removes major gridlines
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()   # removes minor gridlines
  ) +
  
  geom_text(
    aes(label = scales::percent(Proportion, accuracy = 1)),
    position = position_fill(vjust = 0.5),
    color = "white",
    size = 3
  )

behaviour_prop %>%
  arrange(Heatwave_Status, Bleached_Overall, desc(Proportion)) %>%
  mutate(Proportion = round(Proportion, 3)) %>%
  print(n = Inf)   # show all rows
## # A tibble: 20 × 8
## # Groups:   Group [4]
##    Heatwave_Status Bleached_Overall Behavioural_Category Total_Count Proportion
##    <chr>           <fct>            <chr>                      <int>      <dbl>
##  1 Before          FALSE            Maintenance                  385      0.397
##  2 Before          FALSE            Defence                      357      0.368
##  3 Before          FALSE            Neutral                      190      0.196
##  4 Before          FALSE            Submissive                    22      0.023
##  5 Before          FALSE            Aggressive                    16      0.016
##  6 Before          TRUE             Maintenance                  824      0.468
##  7 Before          TRUE             Defence                      648      0.368
##  8 Before          TRUE             Neutral                      215      0.122
##  9 Before          TRUE             Aggressive                    60      0.034
## 10 Before          TRUE             Submissive                    15      0.009
## 11 During          FALSE            Maintenance                  437      0.423
## 12 During          FALSE            Defence                      431      0.417
## 13 During          FALSE            Neutral                      151      0.146
## 14 During          FALSE            Submissive                    13      0.013
## 15 During          FALSE            Aggressive                     2      0.002
## 16 During          TRUE             Maintenance                  806      0.428
## 17 During          TRUE             Defence                      802      0.426
## 18 During          TRUE             Neutral                      139      0.074
## 19 During          TRUE             Aggressive                   121      0.064
## 20 During          TRUE             Submissive                    14      0.007
## # ℹ 3 more variables: Group <chr>, label_pos <dbl>, Label <chr>
#Code to create figure showing amount and direction of change
ggplot(behaviour_prop, aes(x = Heatwave_Status, 
                           y = Proportion, 
                           color = Behavioural_Category, 
                           group = Behavioural_Category)) +
  
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  
  facet_wrap(~Bleached_Overall,
             labeller = labeller(
               Bleached_Overall = c(
                 "FALSE" = "Unbleached",
                 "TRUE" = "Bleached"
               )
             )) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(
    name = "Time Point",
    labels = c(
      "Before" = "Time Point 1",
      "During" = "Time Point 2"
    )
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "#009E73",
      "#D55E00",
      "#0072B2",
      "#56B4E9",
      "#E69F00"
    )
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  
  labs(
    y = "Percentage of behaviours displayed",
    color = "Behaviour category",
  )

##Specific Behaviour Models

## Specific Behaviour Models ####
###Mutualism ####
####Maintenance####
#creating and displaying model
hurdmain  <- glmmTMB(Count ~ Heatwave_Status * Bleached_Overall*Behaviour+ N_fish + Anemone_Area_SC +
                       ThermalExposure_SC+ (1|Anemone)
                     + offset(log(Time_vis)),
                     ziformula = ~Heatwave_Status+ Bleached_Overall+Behaviour,
                     family = ziGamma(link="log"),
                     data = datamain)
summary(hurdmain)
##  Family: Gamma  ( log )
## Formula:          
## Count ~ Heatwave_Status * Bleached_Overall * Behaviour + N_fish +  
##     Anemone_Area_SC + ThermalExposure_SC + (1 | Anemone) + offset(log(Time_vis))
## Zero inflation:         ~Heatwave_Status + Bleached_Overall + Behaviour
## Data: datamain
## 
##      AIC      BIC   logLik deviance df.resid 
##   2363.6   2480.1  -1154.8   2309.6      526 
## 
## Random effects:
## 
## Conditional model:
##  Groups  Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Anemone (Intercept) 0.2049   0.4526  
## Number of obs: 553, groups:  Anemone, 23
## 
## Dispersion estimate for Gamma family (sigma^2): 0.574 
## 
## Conditional model:
##                                                                      Estimate
## (Intercept)                                                         -3.320571
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                               -0.438819
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                                 0.087789
## BehaviourBite Anemone                                               -0.921919
## BehaviourCleaning                                                   -2.443894
## BehaviourMassage Anemone                                             0.157931
## N_fish                                                              -0.129441
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                     -0.030748
## ThermalExposure_SC                                                   0.354873
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                          -0.267337
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourBite Anemone                         -0.903718
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourCleaning                             -0.126406
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourMassage Anemone                      -0.670704
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourBite Anemone                          -0.004128
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourCleaning                               0.852056
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMassage Anemone                       -0.623745
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourBite Anemone     1.069591
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourCleaning         0.012063
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMassage Anemone  0.811702
##                                                                     Std. Error
## (Intercept)                                                           0.746769
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                                 0.462559
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                                  0.329598
## BehaviourBite Anemone                                                 0.318464
## BehaviourCleaning                                                     0.596288
## BehaviourMassage Anemone                                              0.293713

## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMassage Anemone                         0.358523

## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMassage Anemone   0.486870
##                                                                     z value
## (Intercept)                                                          -4.447
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                                -0.949
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                                  0.266
## BehaviourBite Anemone                                                -2.895
## BehaviourCleaning                                                    -4.099
## BehaviourMassage Anemone                                              0.538
## N_fish                                                               -0.508

## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourMassage Anemone                       -1.700
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourBite Anemone                           -0.011

## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMassage Anemone                        -1.740
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourBite Anemone      2.102

##                                                                     Pr(>|z|)
## (Intercept)                                                         8.72e-06
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                                0.34278
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                                 0.78997
## BehaviourBite Anemone                                                0.00379
## BehaviourCleaning                                                   4.16e-05
## BehaviourMassage Anemone                                             0.59078
## N_fish                                                               0.61113

## ThermalExposure_SC                                                   0.05608

## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourBite Anemone     0.03557

## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMassage Anemone  0.09548
##                                                                        
## (Intercept)                                                         ***
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                                  
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                                   
## BehaviourBite Anemone                                               ** 
## BehaviourCleaning                                                   ***
## BehaviourMassage Anemone                                               
## N_fish                                                                 
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                        
## ThermalExposure_SC                                                  .  
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                             
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourBite Anemone                         *  
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourCleaning                                
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourMassage Anemone                      .  
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourBite Anemone                             
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourCleaning                                 
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMassage Anemone                       .  
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourBite Anemone    *  
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourCleaning           
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMassage Anemone .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Zero-inflation model:
##                          Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)              -1.55865    0.28169  -5.533 3.15e-08 ***
## Heatwave_StatusDuring    -0.02617    0.18962  -0.138  0.89022    
## Bleached_OverallTRUE      0.63930    0.22255   2.873  0.00407 ** 
## BehaviourBite Anemone     0.70870    0.26343   2.690  0.00714 ** 
## BehaviourCleaning         2.68349    0.30152   8.900  < 2e-16 ***
## BehaviourMassage Anemone  0.75582    0.26255   2.879  0.00399 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
check_model(hurdmain)
## `check_outliers()` does not yet support models of class `glmmTMB`.

plot_model(hurdmain, type = "int", terms = c("Heatwave_Status", "Bleached_Overall" , "Behaviour"))
## Warning: Some of the focal terms are of type `character`. This may lead to
##   unexpected results. It is recommended to convert these variables to
##   factors before fitting the model.
##   The following variables in are of type character: `Heatwave_Status`
## Model uses a transformed offset term. Predictions may not be correct.
##   It is recommended to fix the offset term using the `condition` argument,
##   e.g. `condition = c(Time_vis = 1)`.
##   You could also transform the offset variable before fitting the model
##   and use `offset(Time_vis)` in the model formula.
## Warning in check_dots(..., .action = "warning"): unknown arguments: full.data
## Warning in check_dots(..., .action = "warning"): Some of the focal terms are of type `character`. This may lead to
##   unexpected results. It is recommended to convert these variables to
##   factors before fitting the model.
##   The following variables in are of type character: `Heatwave_Status`
## Model uses a transformed offset term. Predictions may not be correct.
##   It is recommended to fix the offset term using the `condition` argument,
##   e.g. `condition = c(Time_vis = 1)`.
##   You could also transform the offset variable before fitting the model
##   and use `offset(Time_vis)` in the model formula.
## Warning in check_dots(..., .action = "warning"): unknown arguments: full.data
## Model uses a transformed offset term. Predictions may not be correct.
##   It is recommended to fix the offset term using the `condition` argument,
##   e.g. `condition = c(Time_vis = 1)`.
##   You could also transform the offset variable before fitting the model
##   and use `offset(Time_vis)` in the model formula.
## Warning in check_dots(..., .action = "warning"): unknown arguments: full.data
## Warning in check_dots(..., .action = "warning"): Some of the focal terms are of type `character`. This may lead to
##   unexpected results. It is recommended to convert these variables to
##   factors before fitting the model.
##   The following variables in are of type character: `Heatwave_Status`
## Model uses a transformed offset term. Predictions may not be correct.
##   It is recommended to fix the offset term using the `condition` argument,
##   e.g. `condition = c(Time_vis = 1)`.
##   You could also transform the offset variable before fitting the model
##   and use `offset(Time_vis)` in the model formula.
## Warning in check_dots(..., .action = "warning"): unknown arguments: full.data
## [[1]]
## Ignoring unknown labels:
## • linetype : "Bleached_Overall"
## • shape : "Bleached_Overall"

## 
## [[2]]
## Ignoring unknown labels:
## • linetype : "Behaviour"
## • shape : "Behaviour"

## 
## [[3]]
## Ignoring unknown labels:
## • linetype : "Behaviour"
## • shape : "Behaviour"

## 
## [[4]]
## Ignoring unknown labels:
## • linetype : "Bleached_Overall"
## • shape : "Bleached_Overall"

#posthoc analysis 
emmeans_interactionmain <- emmeans(hurdmain,pairwise ~ Heatwave_Status | Bleached_Overall | Behaviour)
emmeans_interactionmain
## $emmeans
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Aerate:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           2.545 0.330 Inf     1.899     3.192
##  During           2.107 0.349 Inf     1.422     2.791
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Aerate:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           2.633 0.238 Inf     2.167     3.100
##  During           1.927 0.258 Inf     1.422     2.432
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Bite Anemone:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           1.623 0.353 Inf     0.933     2.314
##  During           0.281 0.373 Inf    -0.451     1.013
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Bite Anemone:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           1.707 0.254 Inf     1.210     2.204
##  During           1.167 0.292 Inf     0.595     1.738
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Cleaning:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.102 0.609 Inf    -1.092     1.295
##  During          -0.464 0.623 Inf    -1.684     0.757
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Cleaning:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           1.041 0.333 Inf     0.388     1.695
##  During           0.221 0.356 Inf    -0.476     0.918
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Massage Anemone:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           2.703 0.332 Inf     2.052     3.354
##  During           1.594 0.357 Inf     0.895     2.293
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Massage Anemone:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           2.167 0.254 Inf     1.670     2.664
##  During           1.602 0.269 Inf     1.075     2.129
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Aerate:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    0.439 0.463 Inf   0.949  0.3428
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Aerate:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    0.706 0.370 Inf   1.911  0.0561
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Bite Anemone:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    1.343 0.505 Inf   2.658  0.0079
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Bite Anemone:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    0.540 0.414 Inf   1.305  0.1919
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Cleaning:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    0.565 0.838 Inf   0.675  0.4998
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Cleaning:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    0.820 0.496 Inf   1.653  0.0984
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Massage Anemone:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    1.110 0.481 Inf   2.308  0.0210
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Massage Anemone:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    0.565 0.383 Inf   1.477  0.1396
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale.
plot(emmeans_interactionmain)

emmeans_flipmain <- emmeans(hurdmain,pairwise ~ Bleached_Overall | Behaviour|Heatwave_Status)
emmeans_flipmain
## $emmeans
## Behaviour = Aerate, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             2.545 0.330 Inf     1.899     3.192
##  TRUE              2.633 0.238 Inf     2.167     3.100
## 
## Behaviour = Bite Anemone, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             1.623 0.353 Inf     0.933     2.314
##  TRUE              1.707 0.254 Inf     1.210     2.204
## 
## Behaviour = Cleaning, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.102 0.609 Inf    -1.092     1.295
##  TRUE              1.041 0.333 Inf     0.388     1.695
## 
## Behaviour = Massage Anemone, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             2.703 0.332 Inf     2.052     3.354
##  TRUE              2.167 0.254 Inf     1.670     2.664
## 
## Behaviour = Aerate, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             2.107 0.349 Inf     1.422     2.791
##  TRUE              1.927 0.258 Inf     1.422     2.432
## 
## Behaviour = Bite Anemone, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.281 0.373 Inf    -0.451     1.013
##  TRUE              1.167 0.292 Inf     0.595     1.738
## 
## Behaviour = Cleaning, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -0.464 0.623 Inf    -1.684     0.757
##  TRUE              0.221 0.356 Inf    -0.476     0.918
## 
## Behaviour = Massage Anemone, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             1.594 0.357 Inf     0.895     2.293
##  TRUE              1.602 0.269 Inf     1.075     2.129
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
## Behaviour = Aerate, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE -0.08779 0.330 Inf  -0.266  0.7900
## 
## Behaviour = Bite Anemone, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE -0.08366 0.355 Inf  -0.236  0.8135
## 
## Behaviour = Cleaning, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE -0.93985 0.647 Inf  -1.452  0.1464
## 
## Behaviour = Massage Anemone, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE  0.53596 0.344 Inf   1.560  0.1188
## 
## Behaviour = Aerate, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE  0.17955 0.322 Inf   0.558  0.5767
## 
## Behaviour = Bite Anemone, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE -0.88592 0.351 Inf  -2.527  0.0115
## 
## Behaviour = Cleaning, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE -0.68457 0.649 Inf  -1.054  0.2918
## 
## Behaviour = Massage Anemone, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE -0.00841 0.335 Inf  -0.025  0.9800
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale.
emmip(hurdmain,Bleached_Overall ~ Heatwave_Status *Behaviour)

emm_df1<- as.data.frame(emmeans_interactionmain$emmeans)

emm_df1 <- emm_df1 %>%
  mutate(response = exp(emmean),
         lower = exp(asymp.LCL),
         upper = exp(asymp.UCL))

ggplot(emm_df1, aes(x = Behaviour, y = response, fill = Bleached_Overall)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Heatwave_Status) +
  labs(y = "Estimated Count (on response scale)", x = "Behaviour", fill = "Bleached") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

#palettes for indiviudal plots
green_palette <- c("#009E73", "#33A373", "#66B373", "#99C373", "#CCE373")
vermillion_palette <- c("#FFB380", "#E57A33", "#D55E00", "#A64500", "#7A2A00")
blue_palette <- c("#80B3FF", "#3390E5", "#0072B2", "#005490", "#003D70")
skyblue_palette <- c("#56B4E9", "#7ABDEB", "#9EC5ED", "#C2CDF0", "#E6D5F2")
orange_palette <- c("#E69F00", "#FFB84D", "#FF9933", "#FF8000", "#CC6600")
colnames(emm_df1)
##  [1] "Heatwave_Status"  "Bleached_Overall" "Behaviour"        "emmean"          
##  [5] "SE"               "df"               "asymp.LCL"        "asymp.UCL"       
##  [9] "response"         "lower"            "upper"
# Line plot
Mainplot<-ggplot(emm_df1, aes(
  x = Heatwave_Status,
  y = response,           # or emmean
  color = Behaviour,
  group = Behaviour,
  fill = Behaviour        # for ribbon
)) +
  # Ribbon for ±SE
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = response - SE, ymax = response + SE), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  
  # Line for mean
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  
  # Points for mean
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  
  facet_wrap(~Bleached_Overall,
             labeller = labeller(
               Bleached_Overall = c(
                 "FALSE" = "Unbleached",
                 "TRUE" = "Bleached"
               )
             )) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(
    name = "Time Point",
    labels = c("Before" = "Time Point 1",
               "During" = "Time Point 2")
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = blue_palette) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = blue_palette) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),   # ← draws both x and y axes
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Time Point",
    y = "Estimated count",
    color = "Behaviour",
    fill = "Behaviour"
  )
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
Mainplot

####Defence####
hurddef <- glmmTMB(Count ~ Heatwave_Status* Behaviour* Bleached_Overall+ N_fish+ Anemone_Area_SC+
                     ThermalExposure_SC+ (1|Anemone)
                   + offset(log(Time_vis)),
                   ziformula = ~Heatwave_Status+ Bleached_Overall+Behaviour,
                   family = ziGamma(link="log"),
                   data = datadef)
summary(hurddef)
##  Family: Gamma  ( log )
## Formula:          
## Count ~ Heatwave_Status * Behaviour * Bleached_Overall + N_fish +  
##     Anemone_Area_SC + ThermalExposure_SC + (1 | Anemone) + offset(log(Time_vis))
## Zero inflation:         ~Heatwave_Status + Bleached_Overall + Behaviour
## Data: datadef
## 
##      AIC      BIC   logLik deviance df.resid 
##   2267.8   2413.0  -1101.9   2203.8      658 
## 
## Random effects:
## 
## Conditional model:
##  Groups  Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Anemone (Intercept) 0.2762   0.5256  
## Number of obs: 690, groups:  Anemone, 23
## 
## Dispersion estimate for Gamma family (sigma^2): 0.405 
## 
## Conditional model:
##                                                                       Estimate
## (Intercept)                                                           -4.17096
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                                 -0.44130
## BehaviourFlick - defence                                              -0.34920
## BehaviourGuards                                                        1.01860
## BehaviourHead down display                                            -0.10262
## BehaviourJerk - defence                                               -0.41156
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                                  -0.55192
## N_fish                                                                -0.12500
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                       -0.11822
## ThermalExposure_SC                                                     0.33827
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourFlick - defence                        -1.98056
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourGuards                                  0.12369
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourHead down display                       0.04459
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourJerk - defence                         -0.53151
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                            -0.02692
## BehaviourFlick - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE                         -0.66921
## BehaviourGuards:Bleached_OverallTRUE                                   0.46661
## BehaviourHead down display:Bleached_OverallTRUE                        0.58462
## BehaviourJerk - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE                           0.37964
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourFlick - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE    1.72843
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourGuards:Bleached_OverallTRUE             0.06566
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourHead down display:Bleached_OverallTRUE  0.34605
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourJerk - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE     0.56573
##                                                                       Std. Error
## (Intercept)                                                              0.81410
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                                    0.60195
## BehaviourFlick - defence                                                 0.43426
## BehaviourGuards                                                          0.27237
## BehaviourHead down display                                               0.29868
## BehaviourJerk - defence                                                  0.29649
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                                     0.37520
## N_fish                                                                   0.26090
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                          0.12437
## ThermalExposure_SC                                                       0.21944
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourFlick - defence                           0.67014
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourGuards                                    0.39602
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourHead down display                         0.44299
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourJerk - defence                            0.43855
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                               0.41221
## BehaviourFlick - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE                            0.65184
## BehaviourGuards:Bleached_OverallTRUE                                     0.33617
## BehaviourHead down display:Bleached_OverallTRUE                          0.39481
## BehaviourJerk - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE                             0.37271
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourFlick - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE      0.95326
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourGuards:Bleached_OverallTRUE               0.48409
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourHead down display:Bleached_OverallTRUE    0.56422
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourJerk - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE       0.54283
##                                                                       z value
## (Intercept)                                                            -5.123
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                                  -0.733
## BehaviourFlick - defence                                               -0.804
## BehaviourGuards                                                         3.740
## BehaviourHead down display                                             -0.344
## BehaviourJerk - defence                                                -1.388
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                                   -1.471
## N_fish                                                                 -0.479
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                        -0.951
## ThermalExposure_SC                                                      1.541
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourFlick - defence                         -2.955
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourGuards                                   0.312
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourHead down display                        0.101
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourJerk - defence                          -1.212
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                             -0.065
## BehaviourFlick - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE                          -1.027
## BehaviourGuards:Bleached_OverallTRUE                                    1.388
## BehaviourHead down display:Bleached_OverallTRUE                         1.481
## BehaviourJerk - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE                            1.019
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourFlick - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE     1.813
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourGuards:Bleached_OverallTRUE              0.136
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourHead down display:Bleached_OverallTRUE   0.613
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourJerk - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE      1.042
##                                                                       Pr(>|z|)
## (Intercept)                                                              3e-07
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                                 0.463491
## BehaviourFlick - defence                                              0.421321
## BehaviourGuards                                                       0.000184
## BehaviourHead down display                                            0.731164
## BehaviourJerk - defence                                               0.165102
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                                  0.141297
## N_fish                                                                0.631873
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                       0.341819
## ThermalExposure_SC                                                    0.123198
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourFlick - defence                        0.003122
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourGuards                                 0.754790
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourHead down display                      0.919823
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourJerk - defence                         0.225525
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                            0.947934
## BehaviourFlick - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE                         0.304584
## BehaviourGuards:Bleached_OverallTRUE                                  0.165134
## BehaviourHead down display:Bleached_OverallTRUE                       0.138666
## BehaviourJerk - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE                          0.308403
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourFlick - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE   0.069804
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourGuards:Bleached_OverallTRUE            0.892109
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourHead down display:Bleached_OverallTRUE 0.539663
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourJerk - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE    0.297324
##                                                                          
## (Intercept)                                                           ***
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                                    
## BehaviourFlick - defence                                                 
## BehaviourGuards                                                       ***
## BehaviourHead down display                                               
## BehaviourJerk - defence                                                  
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                                     
## N_fish                                                                   
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                          
## ThermalExposure_SC                                                       
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourFlick - defence                        ** 
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourGuards                                    
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourHead down display                         
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourJerk - defence                            
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                               
## BehaviourFlick - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE                            
## BehaviourGuards:Bleached_OverallTRUE                                     
## BehaviourHead down display:Bleached_OverallTRUE                          
## BehaviourJerk - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE                             
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourFlick - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE   .  
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourGuards:Bleached_OverallTRUE               
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourHead down display:Bleached_OverallTRUE    
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourJerk - defence:Bleached_OverallTRUE       
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Zero-inflation model:
##                              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)                -2.666e-01  2.495e-01  -1.068    0.285    
## Heatwave_StatusDuring       1.854e-01  1.838e-01   1.009    0.313    
## Bleached_OverallTRUE        8.932e-01  2.065e-01   4.325 1.52e-05 ***
## BehaviourFlick - defence    2.253e+00  3.915e-01   5.755 8.69e-09 ***
## BehaviourGuards            -2.095e+00  2.897e-01  -7.231 4.81e-13 ***
## BehaviourHead down display  3.687e-01  2.598e-01   1.419    0.156    
## BehaviourJerk - defence    -4.795e-06  2.526e-01   0.000    1.000    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
check_model(hurddef)
## `check_outliers()` does not yet support models of class `glmmTMB`.

emmeans_interactiondef <- emmeans(hurddef,pairwise ~ Heatwave_Status | Bleached_Overall | Behaviour)
emmeans_interactiondef
## $emmeans
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Chase - defence:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           1.704 0.398 Inf    0.9239    2.4848
##  During           1.263 0.441 Inf    0.3979    2.1282
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Chase - defence:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           1.152 0.286 Inf    0.5928    1.7120
##  During           0.684 0.300 Inf    0.0962    1.2722
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Flick - defence:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           1.355 0.548 Inf    0.2808    2.4295
##  During          -1.067 0.584 Inf   -2.2118    0.0783
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Flick - defence:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.134 0.520 Inf   -0.8849    1.1530
##  During          -0.586 0.522 Inf   -1.6095    0.4369
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Guards:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           2.723 0.347 Inf    2.0437    3.4022
##  During           2.405 0.370 Inf    1.6810    3.1297
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Guards:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           2.638 0.267 Inf    2.1151    3.1602
##  During           2.359 0.276 Inf    1.8183    2.8992
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Head down display:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           1.602 0.392 Inf    0.8333    2.3701
##  During           1.205 0.404 Inf    0.4134    1.9966
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Head down display:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           1.634 0.313 Inf    1.0212    2.2476
##  During           1.557 0.321 Inf    0.9274    2.1863
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Jerk - defence:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           1.293 0.399 Inf    0.5114    2.0741
##  During           0.320 0.420 Inf   -0.5041    1.1441
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Jerk - defence:
##  Heatwave_Status emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           1.121 0.287 Inf    0.5576    1.6834
##  During           0.687 0.317 Inf    0.0652    1.3079
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Chase - defence:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   0.4413 0.602 Inf   0.733  0.4635
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Chase - defence:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   0.4682 0.439 Inf   1.067  0.2860
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Flick - defence:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   2.4219 0.821 Inf   2.951  0.0032
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Flick - defence:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   0.7203 0.733 Inf   0.982  0.3259
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Guards:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   0.3176 0.494 Inf   0.643  0.5205
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Guards:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   0.2789 0.424 Inf   0.657  0.5109
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Head down display:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   0.3967 0.547 Inf   0.725  0.4687
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Head down display:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   0.0776 0.470 Inf   0.165  0.8690
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Jerk - defence:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   0.9728 0.587 Inf   1.657  0.0975
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Jerk - defence:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   0.4340 0.470 Inf   0.923  0.3563
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale.
plot(emmeans_interactiondef)

emmeans_flipdef <- emmeans(hurddef,pairwise ~ Bleached_Overall | Behaviour|Heatwave_Status)
emmeans_flipdef
## $emmeans
## Behaviour = Chase - defence, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             1.704 0.398 Inf    0.9239    2.4848
##  TRUE              1.152 0.286 Inf    0.5928    1.7120
## 
## Behaviour = Flick - defence, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             1.355 0.548 Inf    0.2808    2.4295
##  TRUE              0.134 0.520 Inf   -0.8849    1.1530
## 
## Behaviour = Guards, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             2.723 0.347 Inf    2.0437    3.4022
##  TRUE              2.638 0.267 Inf    2.1151    3.1602
## 
## Behaviour = Head down display, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
