##  FALSE             1.602 0.392 Inf    0.8333    2.3701
##  TRUE              1.634 0.313 Inf    1.0212    2.2476
## 
## Behaviour = Jerk - defence, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             1.293 0.399 Inf    0.5114    2.0741
##  TRUE              1.121 0.287 Inf    0.5576    1.6834
## 
## Behaviour = Chase - defence, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             1.263 0.441 Inf    0.3979    2.1282
##  TRUE              0.684 0.300 Inf    0.0962    1.2722
## 
## Behaviour = Flick - defence, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -1.067 0.584 Inf   -2.2118    0.0783
##  TRUE             -0.586 0.522 Inf   -1.6095    0.4369
## 
## Behaviour = Guards, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             2.405 0.370 Inf    1.6810    3.1297
##  TRUE              2.359 0.276 Inf    1.8183    2.8992
## 
## Behaviour = Head down display, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             1.205 0.404 Inf    0.4134    1.9966
##  TRUE              1.557 0.321 Inf    0.9274    2.1863
## 
## Behaviour = Jerk - defence, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.320 0.420 Inf   -0.5041    1.1441
##  TRUE              0.687 0.317 Inf    0.0652    1.3079
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
## Behaviour = Chase - defence, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   0.5519 0.375 Inf   1.471  0.1413
## 
## Behaviour = Flick - defence, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   1.2211 0.674 Inf   1.812  0.0700
## 
## Behaviour = Guards, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   0.0853 0.319 Inf   0.268  0.7890
## 
## Behaviour = Head down display, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE  -0.0327 0.399 Inf  -0.082  0.9347
## 
## Behaviour = Jerk - defence, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   0.1723 0.375 Inf   0.460  0.6458
## 
## Behaviour = Chase - defence, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   0.5788 0.410 Inf   1.413  0.1577
## 
## Behaviour = Flick - defence, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE  -0.4804 0.708 Inf  -0.679  0.4974
## 
## Behaviour = Guards, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   0.0466 0.325 Inf   0.143  0.8862
## 
## Behaviour = Head down display, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE  -0.3518 0.400 Inf  -0.879  0.3792
## 
## Behaviour = Jerk - defence, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE  -0.3665 0.391 Inf  -0.937  0.3487
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale.
emmip(hurddef,Bleached_Overall ~ Heatwave_Status *Behaviour)

emm_df3<- as.data.frame(emmeans_interactiondef$emmeans)

emm_df3 <- emm_df3 %>%
  mutate(response = exp(emmean),
         lower = exp(asymp.LCL),
         upper = exp(asymp.UCL))

ggplot(emm_df3, aes(x = Behaviour, y = response, fill = Bleached_Overall)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Heatwave_Status) +
  labs(y = "Estimated Count (on response scale)", x = "Behaviour", fill = "Bleached") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

#plotting defence behaviours
Defplot<-ggplot(emm_df3, aes(
  x = Heatwave_Status,
  y = response,
  color = Behaviour,
  group = Behaviour,
  fill = Behaviour   # needed for ribbon
)) +
  
  # Ribbon for ±SE
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = response - SE, ymax = response + SE), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  
  # Line for mean
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  
  # Points for mean
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  
  facet_wrap(~Bleached_Overall,
             labeller = labeller(
               Bleached_Overall = c(
                 "FALSE" = "Unbleached",
                 "TRUE" = "Bleached"
               )
             )) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(
    name = "Time Point",
    labels = c("Before" = "Time Point 1",
               "During" = "Time Point 2")
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = vermillion_palette) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vermillion_palette) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),   # ← draws both x and y axes
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +

  labs(
    x = "Time Point",
    y = "Estimated count",
    color = "Behaviour",
    fill = "Behaviour"
  )
Defplot

###Social####
####Aggressive####
hurdagg <- glmmTMB(Count ~ Heatwave_Status*Bleached_Overall+Behaviour + N_fish+ Anemone_Area_SC+
                      ThermalExposure_SC+(1|Anemone)
                   + offset(log(Time_vis)),
                   ziformula = ~Heatwave_Status+ Bleached_Overall+Behaviour,
                   family = ziGamma(link="log"),
                   data = dataagg)
summary(hurdagg)
##  Family: Gamma  ( log )
## Formula:          
## Count ~ Heatwave_Status * Bleached_Overall + Behaviour + N_fish +  
##     Anemone_Area_SC + ThermalExposure_SC + (1 | Anemone) + offset(log(Time_vis))
## Zero inflation:         ~Heatwave_Status + Bleached_Overall + Behaviour
## Data: dataagg
## 
##      AIC      BIC   logLik deviance df.resid 
##    739.9    830.6   -349.9    699.9      670 
## 
## Random effects:
## 
## Conditional model:
##  Groups  Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Anemone (Intercept) 0.1738   0.4169  
## Number of obs: 690, groups:  Anemone, 23
## 
## Dispersion estimate for Gamma family (sigma^2): 0.391 
## 
## Conditional model:
##                                            Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)
## (Intercept)                                -7.51481    1.08459  -6.929 4.25e-12
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                      -1.40521    1.04023  -1.351  0.17674
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                       -0.37124    0.39757  -0.934  0.35042
## BehaviourBite                              -0.02099    0.31422  -0.067  0.94674
## BehaviourChase - aggressive                 0.28649    0.27158   1.055  0.29146
## BehaviourFlick - aggressive                -0.44168    0.40454  -1.092  0.27491
## BehaviourJerk - aggressive                 -0.01251    0.25919  -0.048  0.96152
## N_fish                                      0.69078    0.39351   1.755  0.07919
## Anemone_Area_SC                             0.11458    0.15683   0.731  0.46505
## ThermalExposure_SC                          0.26166    0.37055   0.706  0.48011
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE  1.73221    0.63329   2.735  0.00623
##                                               
## (Intercept)                                ***
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                         
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                          
## BehaviourBite                                 
## BehaviourChase - aggressive                   
## BehaviourFlick - aggressive                   
## BehaviourJerk - aggressive                    
## N_fish                                     .  
## Anemone_Area_SC                               
## ThermalExposure_SC                            
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Zero-inflation model:
##                             Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)                   3.3408     0.4824   6.925 4.35e-12 ***
## Heatwave_StatusDuring         0.2217     0.2523   0.879  0.37959    
## Bleached_OverallTRUE         -0.8211     0.3440  -2.387  0.01699 *  
## BehaviourBite                -0.3440     0.4826  -0.713  0.47600    
## BehaviourChase - aggressive  -1.2421     0.4298  -2.890  0.00385 ** 
## BehaviourFlick - aggressive   0.4950     0.5845   0.847  0.39710    
## BehaviourJerk - aggressive   -1.3889     0.4247  -3.270  0.00107 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
check_model(hurdagg)
## `check_outliers()` does not yet support models of class `glmmTMB`.

emmeans_interactionagg <- emmeans(hurdagg,pairwise ~ Heatwave_Status | Bleached_Overall | Behaviour)
emmeans_interactionagg
## $emmeans
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Aggressive Display:
##  Heatwave_Status   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.40003 0.515 Inf    -0.609     1.409
##  During          -1.00517 0.848 Inf    -2.668     0.657
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Aggressive Display:
##  Heatwave_Status   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.02880 0.422 Inf    -0.797     0.855
##  During           0.35580 0.547 Inf    -0.716     1.428
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Bite:
##  Heatwave_Status   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.37905 0.546 Inf    -0.691     1.449
##  During          -1.02616 0.808 Inf    -2.610     0.558
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Bite:
##  Heatwave_Status   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.00781 0.417 Inf    -0.810     0.825
##  During           0.33481 0.494 Inf    -0.634     1.304
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Chase - aggressive:
##  Heatwave_Status   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.68653 0.493 Inf    -0.279     1.652
##  During          -0.71868 0.813 Inf    -2.311     0.874
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Chase - aggressive:
##  Heatwave_Status   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.31529 0.375 Inf    -0.420     1.051
##  During           0.64230 0.506 Inf    -0.349     1.633
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Flick - aggressive:
##  Heatwave_Status   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before          -0.04165 0.548 Inf    -1.115     1.032
##  During          -1.44686 0.855 Inf    -3.123     0.229
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Flick - aggressive:
##  Heatwave_Status   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before          -0.41289 0.439 Inf    -1.274     0.448
##  During          -0.08588 0.576 Inf    -1.215     1.043
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Jerk - aggressive:
##  Heatwave_Status   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.38753 0.498 Inf    -0.589     1.364
##  During          -1.01768 0.808 Inf    -2.602     0.566
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Jerk - aggressive:
##  Heatwave_Status   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.01629 0.388 Inf    -0.744     0.777
##  During           0.34330 0.495 Inf    -0.627     1.314
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Aggressive Display:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    1.405 1.040 Inf   1.351  0.1767
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Aggressive Display:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.327 0.714 Inf  -0.458  0.6470
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Bite:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    1.405 1.040 Inf   1.351  0.1767
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Bite:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.327 0.714 Inf  -0.458  0.6470
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Chase - aggressive:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    1.405 1.040 Inf   1.351  0.1767
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Chase - aggressive:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.327 0.714 Inf  -0.458  0.6470
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Flick - aggressive:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    1.405 1.040 Inf   1.351  0.1767
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Flick - aggressive:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.327 0.714 Inf  -0.458  0.6470
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Jerk - aggressive:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    1.405 1.040 Inf   1.351  0.1767
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Jerk - aggressive:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.327 0.714 Inf  -0.458  0.6470
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale.
plot(emmeans_interactionagg)

emmeans_flipagg <- emmeans(hurdagg,pairwise ~ Bleached_Overall | Behaviour|Heatwave_Status)
emmeans_flipagg
## $emmeans
## Behaviour = Aggressive Display, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.40003 0.515 Inf    -0.609     1.409
##  TRUE              0.02880 0.422 Inf    -0.797     0.855
## 
## Behaviour = Bite, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.37905 0.546 Inf    -0.691     1.449
##  TRUE              0.00781 0.417 Inf    -0.810     0.825
## 
## Behaviour = Chase - aggressive, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.68653 0.493 Inf    -0.279     1.652
##  TRUE              0.31529 0.375 Inf    -0.420     1.051
## 
## Behaviour = Flick - aggressive, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -0.04165 0.548 Inf    -1.115     1.032
##  TRUE             -0.41289 0.439 Inf    -1.274     0.448
## 
## Behaviour = Jerk - aggressive, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.38753 0.498 Inf    -0.589     1.364
##  TRUE              0.01629 0.388 Inf    -0.744     0.777
## 
## Behaviour = Aggressive Display, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -1.00517 0.848 Inf    -2.668     0.657
##  TRUE              0.35580 0.547 Inf    -0.716     1.428
## 
## Behaviour = Bite, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -1.02616 0.808 Inf    -2.610     0.558
##  TRUE              0.33481 0.494 Inf    -0.634     1.304
## 
## Behaviour = Chase - aggressive, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -0.71868 0.813 Inf    -2.311     0.874
##  TRUE              0.64230 0.506 Inf    -0.349     1.633
## 
## Behaviour = Flick - aggressive, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -1.44686 0.855 Inf    -3.123     0.229
##  TRUE             -0.08588 0.576 Inf    -1.215     1.043
## 
## Behaviour = Jerk - aggressive, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall   emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -1.01768 0.808 Inf    -2.602     0.566
##  TRUE              0.34330 0.495 Inf    -0.627     1.314
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
## Behaviour = Aggressive Display, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE    0.371 0.398 Inf   0.934  0.3504
## 
## Behaviour = Bite, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE    0.371 0.398 Inf   0.934  0.3504
## 
## Behaviour = Chase - aggressive, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE    0.371 0.398 Inf   0.934  0.3504
## 
## Behaviour = Flick - aggressive, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE    0.371 0.398 Inf   0.934  0.3504
## 
## Behaviour = Jerk - aggressive, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE    0.371 0.398 Inf   0.934  0.3504
## 
## Behaviour = Aggressive Display, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   -1.361 0.586 Inf  -2.322  0.0202
## 
## Behaviour = Bite, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   -1.361 0.586 Inf  -2.322  0.0202
## 
## Behaviour = Chase - aggressive, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   -1.361 0.586 Inf  -2.322  0.0202
## 
## Behaviour = Flick - aggressive, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   -1.361 0.586 Inf  -2.322  0.0202
## 
## Behaviour = Jerk - aggressive, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   -1.361 0.586 Inf  -2.322  0.0202
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale.
emmip(hurdmain,Bleached_Overall ~ Heatwave_Status *Behaviour)

emm_df2<- as.data.frame(emmeans_interactionagg$emmeans)

emm_df2 <- emm_df2 %>%
  mutate(response = exp(emmean),
         lower = exp(asymp.LCL),
         upper = exp(asymp.UCL))

ggplot(emm_df2, aes(x = Behaviour, y = response, fill = Bleached_Overall)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Heatwave_Status) +
  labs(y = "Estimated Count (on response scale)", x = "Behaviour", fill = "Bleached") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

#Plotting aggressive behaviour
Aggplot<-ggplot(emm_df2, aes(
  x = Heatwave_Status,
  y = response,
  color = Behaviour,
  group = Behaviour,
  fill = Behaviour   # needed for ribbon
)) +
  
  # Ribbon for ±SE
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = response - SE, ymax = response + SE), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  
  # Line for mean
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  
  # Points for mean
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  
  facet_wrap(~Bleached_Overall,
             labeller = labeller(
               Bleached_Overall = c(
                 "FALSE" = "Unbleached",
                 "TRUE" = "Bleached"
               )
             )) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(
    name = "Time Point",
    labels = c("Before" = "Time Point 1",
               "During" = "Time Point 2")
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = green_palette) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = green_palette) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),   # ← draws both x and y axes
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +

  labs(
    x = "Time Point",
    y = "Estimated count",
    color = "Behaviour",
    fill = "Behaviour"
  )
Aggplot

####Neutral####
hurdneu  <- glmmTMB(Count ~ Heatwave_Status * Bleached_Overall*Behaviour+ N_fish +  Anemone_Area_SC+
                      ThermalExposure_SC+ (1|Anemone)
                    + offset(log(Time_vis)),
                    ziformula = ~Heatwave_Status+ Bleached_Overall+Behaviour,
                    family = ziGamma(link="log"),
                    data = dataneu)
summary(hurdneu)
##  Family: Gamma  ( log )
## Formula:          
## Count ~ Heatwave_Status * Bleached_Overall * Behaviour + N_fish +  
##     Anemone_Area_SC + ThermalExposure_SC + (1 | Anemone) + offset(log(Time_vis))
## Zero inflation:         ~Heatwave_Status + Bleached_Overall + Behaviour
## Data: dataneu
## 
##      AIC      BIC   logLik deviance df.resid 
##   1243.4   1388.6   -589.7   1179.4      659 
## 
## Random effects:
## 
## Conditional model:
##  Groups  Name        Variance  Std.Dev. 
##  Anemone (Intercept) 1.527e-09 3.908e-05
## Number of obs: 691, groups:  Anemone, 23
## 
## Dispersion estimate for Gamma family (sigma^2): 0.337 
## 
## Conditional model:
##                                                                Estimate
## (Intercept)                                                    -5.80729
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                          -1.08166
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                           -0.47611
## BehaviourAssociate                                              1.49883
## BehaviourFollows                                               -0.05295
## BehaviourMeeting                                               -0.76927
## BehaviourSoft Touch                                            -0.84368
## N_fish                                                          0.34370
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                 0.04027
## ThermalExposure_SC                                              0.26336
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                      0.29438
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourAssociate                        0.82053
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourFollows                          0.26993
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourMeeting                          0.11816
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourSoft Touch                       0.01356
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourAssociate                         0.05365
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourFollows                           0.06002
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMeeting                           0.44429
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourSoft Touch                        0.12475
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourAssociate  -1.27590
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourFollows     0.64781
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMeeting    -0.04859
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourSoft Touch  0.58901
##                                                                Std. Error
## (Intercept)                                                       0.56469
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                             0.54434
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                              0.42361
## BehaviourAssociate                                                0.38285
## BehaviourFollows                                                  0.41093
## BehaviourMeeting                                                  0.47817
## BehaviourSoft Touch                                               0.46194
## N_fish                                                            0.15806
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                   0.07592
## ThermalExposure_SC                                                0.14725
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                        0.58765
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourAssociate                          0.54817
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourFollows                            0.60503
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourMeeting                            0.71237
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourSoft Touch                         0.80572
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourAssociate                           0.47892
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourFollows                             0.51399
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMeeting                             0.59792
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourSoft Touch                          0.57028
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourAssociate     0.67359
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourFollows       0.75209
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMeeting       0.85888
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourSoft Touch    0.93569
##                                                                z value Pr(>|z|)
## (Intercept)                                                    -10.284  < 2e-16
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                           -1.987   0.0469
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                            -1.124   0.2610
## BehaviourAssociate                                               3.915 9.04e-05
## BehaviourFollows                                                -0.129   0.8975
## BehaviourMeeting                                                -1.609   0.1077
## BehaviourSoft Touch                                             -1.826   0.0678
## N_fish                                                           2.174   0.0297
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                  0.530   0.5958
## ThermalExposure_SC                                               1.789   0.0737
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                       0.501   0.6164
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourAssociate                         1.497   0.1344
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourFollows                           0.446   0.6555
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourMeeting                           0.166   0.8683
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourSoft Touch                        0.017   0.9866
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourAssociate                          0.112   0.9108
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourFollows                            0.117   0.9070
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMeeting                            0.743   0.4574
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourSoft Touch                         0.219   0.8268
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourAssociate   -1.894   0.0582
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourFollows      0.861   0.3890
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMeeting     -0.057   0.9549
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourSoft Touch   0.629   0.5290
##                                                                   
## (Intercept)                                                    ***
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                                          *  
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                                              
## BehaviourAssociate                                             ***
## BehaviourFollows                                                  
## BehaviourMeeting                                                  
## BehaviourSoft Touch                                            .  
## N_fish                                                         *  
## Anemone_Area_SC                                                   
## ThermalExposure_SC                                             .  
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE                        
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourAssociate                          
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourFollows                            
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourMeeting                            
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:BehaviourSoft Touch                         
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourAssociate                           
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourFollows                             
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMeeting                             
## Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourSoft Touch                          
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourAssociate  .  
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourFollows       
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourMeeting       
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE:BehaviourSoft Touch    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Zero-inflation model:
##                        Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)            1.545874   0.308087   5.018 5.23e-07 ***
## Heatwave_StatusDuring  0.179690   0.198313   0.906   0.3649    
## Bleached_OverallTRUE   0.371264   0.216567   1.714   0.0865 .  
## BehaviourAssociate    -1.556089   0.307297  -5.064 4.11e-07 ***
## BehaviourFollows      -0.576071   0.328790  -1.752   0.0798 .  
## BehaviourMeeting       0.065736   0.362671   0.181   0.8562    
## BehaviourSoft Touch    0.009656   0.358135   0.027   0.9785    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
check_model(hurdneu)
## `check_outliers()` does not yet support models of class `glmmTMB`.

emmeans_interactionneu <- emmeans(hurdneu,pairwise ~ Heatwave_Status | Bleached_Overall | Behaviour)
emmeans_interactionneu
## $emmeans
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Approach:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           1.2394 0.362 Inf     0.530     1.949
##  During           0.1577 0.383 Inf    -0.593     0.908
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Approach:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.7632 0.282 Inf     0.210     1.316
##  During          -0.0240 0.249 Inf    -0.513     0.465
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Associate:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           2.7382 0.228 Inf     2.292     3.185
##  During           2.4770 0.272 Inf     1.944     3.010
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Associate:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           2.3157 0.187 Inf     1.949     2.682
##  During           1.0731 0.211 Inf     0.660     1.486
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Follows:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           1.1864 0.279 Inf     0.640     1.733
##  During           0.3747 0.351 Inf    -0.313     1.062
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Follows:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.7703 0.207 Inf     0.364     1.177
##  During           0.9008 0.280 Inf     0.353     1.449
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Meeting:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.4701 0.363 Inf    -0.242     1.182
##  During          -0.4934 0.436 Inf    -1.348     0.361
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Meeting:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.4383 0.302 Inf    -0.154     1.030
##  During          -0.2794 0.284 Inf    -0.836     0.278
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Soft Touch:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.3957 0.337 Inf    -0.265     1.056
##  During          -0.6724 0.604 Inf    -1.857     0.512
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Soft Touch:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.0443 0.271 Inf    -0.486     0.575
##  During          -0.1404 0.227 Inf    -0.584     0.304
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Approach:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    1.082 0.544 Inf   1.987  0.0469
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Approach:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    0.787 0.405 Inf   1.943  0.0521
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Associate:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    0.261 0.397 Inf   0.657  0.5111
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Associate:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    1.243 0.322 Inf   3.856  0.0001
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Follows:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    0.812 0.483 Inf   1.680  0.0929
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Follows:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.130 0.389 Inf  -0.335  0.7375
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Meeting:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    0.963 0.601 Inf   1.602  0.1091
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Meeting:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    0.718 0.451 Inf   1.592  0.1114
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Soft Touch:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    1.068 0.724 Inf   1.476  0.1399
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Soft Touch:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During    0.185 0.369 Inf   0.501  0.6163
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale.
plot(emmeans_interactionneu)

emmeans_flipneu <- emmeans(hurdneu,pairwise ~ Bleached_Overall | Behaviour|Heatwave_Status)
emmeans_flipneu
## $emmeans
## Behaviour = Approach, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             1.2394 0.362 Inf     0.530     1.949
##  TRUE              0.7632 0.282 Inf     0.210     1.316
## 
## Behaviour = Associate, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             2.7382 0.228 Inf     2.292     3.185
##  TRUE              2.3157 0.187 Inf     1.949     2.682
## 
## Behaviour = Follows, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             1.1864 0.279 Inf     0.640     1.733
##  TRUE              0.7703 0.207 Inf     0.364     1.177
## 
## Behaviour = Meeting, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.4701 0.363 Inf    -0.242     1.182
##  TRUE              0.4383 0.302 Inf    -0.154     1.030
## 
## Behaviour = Soft Touch, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.3957 0.337 Inf    -0.265     1.056
##  TRUE              0.0443 0.271 Inf    -0.486     0.575
## 
## Behaviour = Approach, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.1577 0.383 Inf    -0.593     0.908
##  TRUE             -0.0240 0.249 Inf    -0.513     0.465
## 
## Behaviour = Associate, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             2.4770 0.272 Inf     1.944     3.010
##  TRUE              1.0731 0.211 Inf     0.660     1.486
## 
## Behaviour = Follows, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.3747 0.351 Inf    -0.313     1.062
##  TRUE              0.9008 0.280 Inf     0.353     1.449
## 
## Behaviour = Meeting, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -0.4934 0.436 Inf    -1.348     0.361
##  TRUE             -0.2794 0.284 Inf    -0.836     0.278
## 
## Behaviour = Soft Touch, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -0.6724 0.604 Inf    -1.857     0.512
##  TRUE             -0.1404 0.227 Inf    -0.584     0.304
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
## Behaviour = Approach, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   0.4761 0.424 Inf   1.124  0.2610
## 
## Behaviour = Associate, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   0.4225 0.229 Inf   1.846  0.0649
## 
## Behaviour = Follows, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   0.4161 0.291 Inf   1.429  0.1530
## 
## Behaviour = Meeting, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   0.0318 0.435 Inf   0.073  0.9417
## 
## Behaviour = Soft Touch, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   0.3514 0.384 Inf   0.915  0.3604
## 
## Behaviour = Approach, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   0.1817 0.426 Inf   0.427  0.6697
## 
## Behaviour = Associate, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   1.4040 0.245 Inf   5.729  <.0001
## 
## Behaviour = Follows, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE  -0.5261 0.369 Inf  -1.426  0.1539
## 
## Behaviour = Meeting, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE  -0.2140 0.468 Inf  -0.457  0.6475
## 
## Behaviour = Soft Touch, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE  -0.5320 0.638 Inf  -0.834  0.4041
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale.
emmip(hurdneu,Bleached_Overall ~ Heatwave_Status *Behaviour)

emm_df4<- as.data.frame(emmeans_interactionneu$emmeans)

emm_df4 <- emm_df4 %>%
  mutate(response = exp(emmean),
         lower = exp(asymp.LCL),
         upper = exp(asymp.UCL))

ggplot(emm_df4, aes(x = Behaviour, y = response, fill = Bleached_Overall)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Heatwave_Status) +
  labs(y = "Estimated Count (on response scale)", x = "Behaviour", fill = "Bleached") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

Neuplot<-ggplot(emm_df4, aes(
  x = Heatwave_Status,
  y = response,
  color = Behaviour,
  group = Behaviour,
  fill = Behaviour   # needed for ribbon
)) +
  
  # Ribbon for ±SE
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = response - SE, ymax = response + SE), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  
  # Line for mean
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  
  # Points for mean
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  
  facet_wrap(~Bleached_Overall,
             labeller = labeller(
               Bleached_Overall = c(
                 "FALSE" = "Unbleached",
                 "TRUE" = "Bleached"
               )
             )) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(
    name = "Time Point",
    labels = c(
      "Before" = "Time Point 1",
      "During" = "Time Point 2"
    )
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = skyblue_palette) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = skyblue_palette) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),   # ← draws both x and y axes
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +

  labs(
    x = "Time Point",
    y = "Estimated count",
    color = "Behaviour",
    fill = "Behaviour"
  )
Neuplot

####Submissive####
hurdsub  <- glmmTMB(Count ~ Heatwave_Status * Bleached_Overall+Behaviour + N_fish + Anemone_Area_SC+
                       ThermalExposure_SC+(1|Anemone)
                    + offset(log(Time_vis)),
                    ziformula = ~Heatwave_Status+ Bleached_Overall+Behaviour,
                    family = ziGamma(link="log"),
                    data = datasub)

summary(hurdsub)
##  Family: Gamma  ( log )
## Formula:          
## Count ~ Heatwave_Status * Bleached_Overall + Behaviour + N_fish +  
##     Anemone_Area_SC + ThermalExposure_SC + (1 | Anemone) + offset(log(Time_vis))
## Zero inflation:         ~Heatwave_Status + Bleached_Overall + Behaviour
## Data: datasub
## 
##      AIC      BIC   logLik deviance df.resid 
##    361.5    452.3   -160.8    321.5      671 
## 
## Random effects:
## 
## Conditional model:
##  Groups  Name        Variance  Std.Dev. 
##  Anemone (Intercept) 1.114e-09 3.338e-05
## Number of obs: 691, groups:  Anemone, 23
## 
## Dispersion estimate for Gamma family (sigma^2): 0.305 
## 
## Conditional model:
##                                            Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)
## (Intercept)                                -7.65813    0.88278  -8.675   <2e-16
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                       0.49938    1.15321   0.433   0.6650
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                       -0.17362    0.30384  -0.571   0.5677
## BehaviourC-Bend                            -1.26567    0.67660  -1.871   0.0614
## BehaviourFlees                             -0.65112    0.36064  -1.805   0.0710
## BehaviourMoving Away                       -0.53866    0.33026  -1.631   0.1029
## BehaviourS-Bend                            -1.26565    0.67660  -1.871   0.0614
## N_fish                                      0.75488    0.27526   2.742   0.0061
## Anemone_Area_SC                            -0.06928    0.14523  -0.477   0.6333
## ThermalExposure_SC                         -0.24594    0.49503  -0.497   0.6193
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE  0.49359    0.46121   1.070   0.2845
##                                               
## (Intercept)                                ***
## Heatwave_StatusDuring                         
## Bleached_OverallTRUE                          
## BehaviourC-Bend                            .  
## BehaviourFlees                             .  
## BehaviourMoving Away                          
## BehaviourS-Bend                            .  
## N_fish                                     ** 
## Anemone_Area_SC                               
## ThermalExposure_SC                            
## Heatwave_StatusDuring:Bleached_OverallTRUE    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Zero-inflation model:
##                       Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)            2.37979    0.48998   4.857 1.19e-06 ***
## Heatwave_StatusDuring  0.05953    0.36033   0.165  0.86877    
## Bleached_OverallTRUE   1.10602    0.36235   3.052  0.00227 ** 
## BehaviourC-Bend        1.82607    1.08922   1.676  0.09364 .  
## BehaviourFlees        -0.32285    0.55834  -0.578  0.56311    
## BehaviourMoving Away  -1.30229    0.49050  -2.655  0.00793 ** 
## BehaviourS-Bend        1.82607    1.08922   1.676  0.09364 .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
check_model(hurdsub)
## `check_outliers()` does not yet support models of class `glmmTMB`.

emmeans_interactionsub <- emmeans(hurdsub,pairwise ~ Heatwave_Status | Bleached_Overall | Behaviour)
emmeans_interactionsub
## $emmeans
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Body Shake:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.4182 0.516 Inf    -0.594     1.431
##  During           0.9176 0.760 Inf    -0.571     2.407
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Body Shake:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before           0.2446 0.549 Inf    -0.832     1.321
##  During           1.2376 0.754 Inf    -0.240     2.715
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = C-Bend:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before          -0.8475 0.863 Inf    -2.539     0.844
##  During          -0.3481 0.803 Inf    -1.921     1.225
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = C-Bend:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before          -1.0211 0.834 Inf    -2.655     0.613
##  During          -0.0281 0.857 Inf    -1.708     1.652
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Flees:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before          -0.2329 0.550 Inf    -1.311     0.845
##  During           0.2665 0.753 Inf    -1.210     1.743
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Flees:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before          -0.4065 0.505 Inf    -1.397     0.584
##  During           0.5864 0.713 Inf    -0.812     1.984
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Moving Away:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before          -0.1204 0.587 Inf    -1.271     1.031
##  During           0.3789 0.628 Inf    -0.851     1.609
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Moving Away:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before          -0.2941 0.536 Inf    -1.345     0.756
##  During           0.6989 0.645 Inf    -0.565     1.962
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = S-Bend:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before          -0.8474 0.863 Inf    -2.539     0.844
##  During          -0.3481 0.803 Inf    -1.921     1.225
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = S-Bend:
##  Heatwave_Status  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  Before          -1.0211 0.834 Inf    -2.655     0.613
##  During          -0.0281 0.857 Inf    -1.708     1.652
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Body Shake:
##  contrast        estimate   SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.499 1.15 Inf  -0.433  0.6650
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Body Shake:
##  contrast        estimate   SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.993 1.11 Inf  -0.891  0.3728
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = C-Bend:
##  contrast        estimate   SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.499 1.15 Inf  -0.433  0.6650
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = C-Bend:
##  contrast        estimate   SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.993 1.11 Inf  -0.891  0.3728
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Flees:
##  contrast        estimate   SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.499 1.15 Inf  -0.433  0.6650
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Flees:
##  contrast        estimate   SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.993 1.11 Inf  -0.891  0.3728
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = Moving Away:
##  contrast        estimate   SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.499 1.15 Inf  -0.433  0.6650
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = Moving Away:
##  contrast        estimate   SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.993 1.11 Inf  -0.891  0.3728
## 
## Bleached_Overall = FALSE, Behaviour = S-Bend:
##  contrast        estimate   SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.499 1.15 Inf  -0.433  0.6650
## 
## Bleached_Overall = TRUE, Behaviour = S-Bend:
##  contrast        estimate   SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Before - During   -0.993 1.11 Inf  -0.891  0.3728
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale.
plot(emmeans_interactionsub)

emmeans_flipsub <- emmeans(hurdsub,pairwise ~ Bleached_Overall | Behaviour|Heatwave_Status)
emmeans_flipsub
## $emmeans
## Behaviour = Body Shake, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.4182 0.516 Inf    -0.594     1.431
##  TRUE              0.2446 0.549 Inf    -0.832     1.321
## 
## Behaviour = C-Bend, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -0.8475 0.863 Inf    -2.539     0.844
##  TRUE             -1.0211 0.834 Inf    -2.655     0.613
## 
## Behaviour = Flees, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -0.2329 0.550 Inf    -1.311     0.845
##  TRUE             -0.4065 0.505 Inf    -1.397     0.584
## 
## Behaviour = Moving Away, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -0.1204 0.587 Inf    -1.271     1.031
##  TRUE             -0.2941 0.536 Inf    -1.345     0.756
## 
## Behaviour = S-Bend, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -0.8474 0.863 Inf    -2.539     0.844
##  TRUE             -1.0211 0.834 Inf    -2.655     0.613
## 
## Behaviour = Body Shake, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.9176 0.760 Inf    -0.571     2.407
##  TRUE              1.2376 0.754 Inf    -0.240     2.715
## 
## Behaviour = C-Bend, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -0.3481 0.803 Inf    -1.921     1.225
##  TRUE             -0.0281 0.857 Inf    -1.708     1.652
## 
## Behaviour = Flees, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.2665 0.753 Inf    -1.210     1.743
##  TRUE              0.5864 0.713 Inf    -0.812     1.984
## 
## Behaviour = Moving Away, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE             0.3789 0.628 Inf    -0.851     1.609
##  TRUE              0.6989 0.645 Inf    -0.565     1.962
## 
## Behaviour = S-Bend, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  Bleached_Overall  emmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
##  FALSE            -0.3481 0.803 Inf    -1.921     1.225
##  TRUE             -0.0281 0.857 Inf    -1.708     1.652
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
## Behaviour = Body Shake, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE    0.174 0.304 Inf   0.571  0.5677
## 
## Behaviour = C-Bend, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE    0.174 0.304 Inf   0.571  0.5677
## 
## Behaviour = Flees, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE    0.174 0.304 Inf   0.571  0.5677
## 
## Behaviour = Moving Away, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE    0.174 0.304 Inf   0.571  0.5677
## 
## Behaviour = S-Bend, Heatwave_Status = Before:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE    0.174 0.304 Inf   0.571  0.5677
## 
## Behaviour = Body Shake, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   -0.320 0.343 Inf  -0.932  0.3511
## 
## Behaviour = C-Bend, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   -0.320 0.343 Inf  -0.932  0.3511
## 
## Behaviour = Flees, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   -0.320 0.343 Inf  -0.932  0.3511
## 
## Behaviour = Moving Away, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   -0.320 0.343 Inf  -0.932  0.3511
## 
## Behaviour = S-Bend, Heatwave_Status = During:
##  contrast     estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  FALSE - TRUE   -0.320 0.343 Inf  -0.932  0.3511
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: N_fish 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale.
emmip(hurdsub,Bleached_Overall ~ Heatwave_Status *Behaviour)

emm_df5<- as.data.frame(emmeans_interactionsub$emmeans)

emm_df5 <- emm_df5 %>%
  mutate(response = exp(emmean),
         lower = exp(asymp.LCL),
         upper = exp(asymp.UCL))

ggplot(emm_df5, aes(x = Behaviour, y = response, fill = Bleached_Overall)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Heatwave_Status) +
  labs(y = "Estimated Count (on response scale)", x = "Behaviour", fill = "Bleached") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# Plot
Subplot<-ggplot(emm_df5, aes(
  x = Heatwave_Status,
  y = response,           # or emmean
  color = Behaviour,
  group = Behaviour,
  fill = Behaviour        # for ribbon
)) +
  
  # Ribbon for ±SE
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = response - SE, ymax = response + SE), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  
  # Line for mean
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  
  # Points for mean
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  
  facet_wrap(~Bleached_Overall,
             labeller = labeller(
               Bleached_Overall = c(
                 "FALSE" = "Unbleached",
                 "TRUE" = "Bleached"
               )
             )) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(
    name = "Time Point",
    labels = c("Before" = "Time Point 1",
               "During" = "Time Point 2")
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = orange_palette) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = orange_palette) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),   # ← draws both x and y axes
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Time Point",
    y = "Estimated count",
    color = "Behaviour",
    fill = "Behaviour"
  )
Subplot

#Raincloud temperature plots####


ggplot(data, aes(x = Heatwave_Status, y = Day_Temp, fill = Heatwave_Status)) +
  
  # Half violin (cloud)
  geom_half_violin(
    side = "l",
    alpha = 0.6,
    trim = FALSE,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)
  ) +
  
  # Jittered points (rain)
  geom_jitter(
    aes(color = Heatwave_Status),
    position = position_jitterdodge(
      jitter.width = 0.1,
      dodge.width = 0.8
    ),
    alpha = 0.4,
    size = 1.5
  ) +
  
  # Boxplot (handle)
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.15,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
  # Labels
  labs(
    x = "Time Point",
    y = "Temperature (°C)"
  ) +
  
  # Match Plot 1 x-axis relabeling
  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = c(
      "Before" = "Time Point 1",
      "During" = "Time Point 2"
    )
  ) +
  
  # Match Plot 1 colour scheme (Okabe–Ito)
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Before" = "#E69F00",   # cool blue
      "During" = "#56B4E9"    # warm orange
    ),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Before" = "#E69F00",
      "During" = "#56B4E9"
    ),
    name = NULL
  )+
  
  # Theme (same as Plot 1)
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none",
    # Add axis lines
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    
    # Make axis text larger
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    
    # Make axis titles larger
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16)
  )

####Bleached Numbers per time point ####


data_unique <- data %>%
  distinct(Anemone, Heatwave_Status, Bleached_Status)
unique(data_unique$Bleached_Status)
## [1] "Non-bleached" "Bleached"
unique(data_unique$Heatwave_Status)
## [1] "Before" "During"
data_unique$Bleached_Status <- factor(
  data_unique$Bleached_Status,
  levels = c("Non-bleached", "Bleached"),  # keep order
  labels = c("Unbleached", "Bleached")     # new labels for legend
)

# Stacked bar chart
ggplot(data_unique, aes(x = Heatwave_Status, fill = Bleached_Status)) +
  
  geom_bar(
    position = "stack",
    width = 0.7
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Time Point",
    y = "Number of Anemones",
    fill = "Bleaching Status"
  ) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = c(
      "Before" = "Time Point 1",
      "During" = "Time Point 2"
    )
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Unbleached" = "#009E73",
      "Bleached"   = "#D55E00"
    )
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16)
  )

data_unique %>%
  count(Heatwave_Status, Bleached_Status)
##   Heatwave_Status Bleached_Status  n
## 1          Before      Unbleached 23
## 2          During      Unbleached 12
## 3          During        Bleached 11
#to add variance to prop line graph ####

behaviour_prop <- data %>%
  group_by(Heatwave_Status, Bleached_Overall, Behavioural_Category, Anemone) %>%
  summarise(Total_Count = sum(Count), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Heatwave_Status, Bleached_Overall, Anemone) %>%
  complete(Behavioural_Category, fill = list(Total_Count = 0)) %>%
  mutate(Proportion = Total_Count / sum(Total_Count)) %>%
  mutate(Proportion = ifelse(is.nan(Proportion), 0, Proportion)) %>%  # <- fix NaN
  mutate(Group = paste0(Heatwave_Status, "|",
                        ifelse(as.logical(Bleached_Overall), "Bleached","Unbleached"),
                        "|", Anemone))



ggplot(behaviour_prop, aes(
  x = Heatwave_Status, 
  y = Proportion, 
  color = Behavioural_Category, 
  group = Behavioural_Category,
  fill = Behavioural_Category  # needed for ribbons
)) +
  
  # Ribbon for mean ± SEM
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "ribbon", alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  
  # Line connecting mean points
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1) +
  
  # Mean points
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 3) +
  
  facet_wrap(~Bleached_Overall,
             labeller = labeller(
               Bleached_Overall = c(
                 "FALSE" = "Unbleached",
                 "TRUE" = "Bleached"
               )
             )) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(
    name = "Time Point",
    labels = c(
      "Before" = "Time Point 1",
      "During" = "Time Point 2"
    ),
    expand = expansion(add = 0.5)  # increase spacing between labels
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Percentage of behaviours displayed",
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "#009E73",
      "#D55E00",
      "#0072B2",
      "#56B4E9",
      "#E69F00"
    )
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "#009E73",
      "#D55E00",
      "#0072B2",
      "#56B4E9",
      "#E69F00"
    )
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),   # Draw axes
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    color = "Behaviour category",
    fill = "Behaviour category"
  )

behaviour_prop <- data %>%
  group_by(Heatwave_Status, Bleached_Overall, Behavioural_Category, Anemone) %>%
  summarise(Total_Count = sum(Count), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Heatwave_Status, Bleached_Overall, Anemone) %>%
  complete(Behavioural_Category, fill = list(Total_Count = 0)) %>%
  mutate(Proportion = Total_Count / sum(Total_Count)) %>%
  mutate(Proportion = ifelse(is.nan(Proportion), 0, Proportion)) %>%  # fix NaN
  mutate(Group = paste0(Heatwave_Status, "|",
                        ifelse(as.logical(Bleached_Overall), "Bleached","Unbleached"),
                        "|", Anemone))


#Proportion y axis
ggplot(behaviour_prop, aes(
  x = Heatwave_Status, 
  y = Proportion, 
  color = Behavioural_Category, 
  group = Behavioural_Category,
  fill = Behavioural_Category  # needed for ribbons
)) +
  
  # Ribbon for mean ± SEM
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "ribbon", alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  
  # Line connecting mean points
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1) +
  
  # Mean points
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 4) +  # slightly bigger points
  
  facet_wrap(~Bleached_Overall,
             labeller = labeller(
               Bleached_Overall = c(
                 "FALSE" = "Unbleached",
                 "TRUE" = "Bleached"
               )
             )) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(
    name = "Time Point",
    labels = c(
      "Before" = "Time Point 1",
      "During" = "Time Point 2"
    ),
    expand = expansion(add = 0.5)
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Proportion of behaviours displayed"
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "#009E73",
      "#D55E00",
      "#0072B2",
      "#56B4E9",
      "#E69F00"
    )
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "#009E73",
      "#D55E00",
      "#0072B2",
      "#56B4E9",
      "#E69F00"
    )
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +  # base font size larger
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    color = "Behaviour category",
    fill = "Behaviour category"
  )

##Combining all specific behaviour plots into one figure

#Combining all single behaiviour plots into one figure ####


(Mainplot | Defplot) /
  (Aggplot | Neuplot) /
  Subplot +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = 'A','B','C','D','E'   # Labels plots A, B, C...
  )

class(Mainplot)
## [1] "ggplot2::ggplot" "ggplot"          "ggplot2::gg"     "S7_object"      
## [5] "gg"
class(Defplot)
## [1] "ggplot2::ggplot" "ggplot"          "ggplot2::gg"     "S7_object"      
## [5] "gg"
class(Aggplot)
## [1] "ggplot2::ggplot" "ggplot"          "ggplot2::gg"     "S7_object"      
## [5] "gg"
class(Neuplot)
## [1] "ggplot2::ggplot" "ggplot"          "ggplot2::gg"     "S7_object"      
## [5] "gg"
class(Subplot)
## [1] "ggplot2::ggplot" "ggplot"          "ggplot2::gg"     "S7_object"      
## [5] "gg"
is.ggplot(Mainplot)
## Warning: `is.ggplot()` was deprecated in ggplot2 3.5.2.
## ℹ Please use `is_ggplot()` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
## [1] TRUE
is.ggplot(Defplot)
## [1] TRUE
is.ggplot(Aggplot)
## [1] TRUE
is.ggplot(Neuplot)
## [1] TRUE
is.ggplot(Subplot)
## [1] TRUE
theme_pub <- theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    # Remove gridlines
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    
    # Axes
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.2, "cm"),
    
    # Text
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    
    # Facet labels
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    
    # Legend
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    
    # Spacing
    plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
  )

Mainplot <- Mainplot + theme_pub
Defplot  <- Defplot  + theme_pub
Aggplot  <- Aggplot  + theme_pub
Neuplot  <- Neuplot  + theme_pub
Subplot  <- Subplot  + theme_pub


labs(y = "Estimated count")
## <ggplot2::labels> List of 1
##  $ y: chr "Estimated count"
x_theme <- list(
  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = c(
      "Before" = "Time\nPoint 1",
      "During" = "Time\nPoint 2"
    )
  ),
  labs(x = NULL),
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 0,
      hjust = 0.5,
      size = 12
    )
  )
)

Mainplot <- Mainplot + x_theme
## Scale for x is already present.
## Adding another scale for x, which will replace the existing scale.
Defplot  <- Defplot  + x_theme
## Scale for x is already present.
## Adding another scale for x, which will replace the existing scale.
Aggplot  <- Aggplot  + x_theme
## Scale for x is already present.
## Adding another scale for x, which will replace the existing scale.
Neuplot  <- Neuplot  + x_theme
## Scale for x is already present.
## Adding another scale for x, which will replace the existing scale.
Subplot  <- Subplot  + x_theme
## Scale for x is already present.
## Adding another scale for x, which will replace the existing scale.
combined_plot <- (Mainplot | Defplot|plot_spacer()) / 
  (Aggplot | Neuplot | Subplot) +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = list(c(
      "A: Maintenance",
      "B: Defensive",
      "C: Aggressive",
      "D: Neutral",
      "E: Submissive"
    )))

combined_plot
